reviewers.name: architecture-strategist
reviewers.focus: SOLID, coupling, cohesion, patterns, abstraction, dependency direction
reviewers.checks: SOLID violations, excessive coupling, wrong patterns, missing abstractions, dependency direction issues, god classes/functions

reviewers.name: performance-oracle
reviewers.focus: N+1 queries, memory leaks, caching, bundle size, lazy loading
reviewers.checks: N+1 queries, unbounded loops, memory leaks, missing caching, excessive re-renders, large bundle imports, missing pagination

reviewers.name: dependency-analyst
reviewers.focus: Outdated packages, CVEs, bloat, unused deps, license issues
reviewers.checks: outdated dependencies, known CVEs, unnecessary imports, dependency bloat, license compatibility, unused packages
